div.div: Implementation note: admin and owner may view providers; only owner may save shared keys or refresh models. The refresh path expects custom_headers, fetched_models, models_fetched_at and fetch_error, which are absent from the current live ai_provider_credentials snapshot. Individual user model preferences are outside this use case.
